characters.appearance: A young South Asian woman in her early to mid-20s with a slim build and fair complexion. She has long, straight black hair tied back from her face. She wears black-rimmed glasses and has a serious but expressive face.
characters.wardrobe: A red and white checkered long-sleeved shirt, a leopard-print scarf, and dark, vertically pinstriped trousers.
characters.demeanor: Authoritative and confident, using expressive hand gestures to emphasize her points while advising her friends.

characters.appearance: A young man of average build with short, dark hair. He is seen only from the back and is out of focus for the entire video.
characters.wardrobe: A light blue and white checkered long-sleeved shirt.

characters.appearance: A young man of average build with short, dark hair, wearing glasses. He is seen only from the back and is out of focus for the entire video.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: दो हफ्ते से तू मुझे दिन के 40 रील्स भेज रहा है। [For two weeks, you've been sending me 40 reels a day.]

Character A says: उसी टाइम में अगर इंग्लिश सीखते तो आज तुम्हारी जॉब लग गई होती। [If you had learned English in that time, you would have a job today.]

Character A says: मैं भी दिन भर रील देखती रहती थी। [I also used to watch reels all day.]

Character A says: मेरे साथ के लोग आगे निकल गए और मैं कच्चा बादाम ही देखती रह गई। [The people with me moved ahead, and I was left watching 'Kacha Badam'.]

Character A says: अपने टाइम की फिक्र करो तो फोन में तुम लोग बहुत कुछ सीख सकते हो। [If you worry about your time, you can learn a lot on your phone.]

Character A says: जैसे ये Supernova ऐप ही देख लो। [For example, look at this Supernova app.]

Character A says: इसमें AI इंग्लिश टीचर के साथ बात करके मैं बिना डरे इंग्लिश बोलना सीख रही हूँ। [In this, by talking with an AI English teacher, I am learning to speak English without fear.]

Character A says: अब मैं हर जगह कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ इंग्लिश बोल पा रही हूं। [Now I can speak English with confidence everywhere.]

Character A says: और अब इंटरव्यू में भी डर नहीं लगता। [And now I don't feel scared in interviews either.]

Character A says: आप लोग भी डिसाइड कर लो। [You guys should also decide.]

Character A says: आप लोगों को दिन भर रील चला के अपना टाइम बर्बाद करना है या Supernova ऐप यूज करके अपने करियर में आगे बढ़ना है। [Do you want to waste your time watching reels all day, or use the Supernova app to move ahead in your career?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by calling out a relatable bad habit (watching too many reels).
- Transitions into the problem of falling behind peers due to poor English skills.
- Introduces Supernova as a practical solution for building confidence and career growth.
- Ends with a strong call to action, contrasting wasted time with self-improvement.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Top Banner: रील्स छोड़ो, रोज़ प्रैक्टिस करो और कॉन्फिडेंस से इंग्लिश बोलो। (Stop watching reels, practice daily and speak English with confidence.)

Animated Captions (appear sequentially): 2 HAFTE, USI TIME, SEEKHTA, TUMHARI, REEL DEKHTA, MERE, AAGE NIKAL, BADAM, APNA, ME TUMLOG, KUCH SEEKH SAKTE, SUPERNOVA, ISME, AI TEACHER, BAAT KARKE, BINA DARE, SEEKH RAHI, AB ME HAR, CONFIDENCE, INTERVIEW, DECIDE, AAPKO, REEL CHALAKE, KARNA, SUPERNOVA APP, USE KARKE CAREER, ME AAGE BADHNA
